commands.review_summary:
The PR moves `runMemoryFlushIfNeeded` ahead of `runPreflightCompactionIfNeeded` in `runReplyAgent` and adds a regression assertion for that maintenance order.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests +5. Total +5 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. live current-main reproduction was run in this read-only sweep. Source inspection shows the current ordering that can cause the pre-turn gap, and the PR includes targeted diagnostics from an earlier head showing the intended order after the patch.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is maintainer review of the session-state reorder plus refreshed current-head proof.

target.title: Run memory flush before preflight compaction
target.body:
Fixes #84695.

## Summary

- run automatic memory flush before preflight compaction in `runReplyAgent`
- keep visible memory-flush errors on the same pre-run return path before the main reply
- add regression coverage proving memory flush is invoked before preflight compaction

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior or issue addressed:** `runReplyAgent` must run the memory-flush phase before the preflight-compaction phase so durable memory has a chance to run before aggressive transcript reduction.
- **Real environment tested:** PR head `023afa3eab3edf93f26a61969309ab3599ae2bce`, worktree `/tmp/openclaw-proof-84792`, local Node runtime using OpenClaw diagnostics timeline output.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:** Ran the patched `runReplyAgent` path with diagnostics timeline enabled and a live session entry. The wrapper waits for the runtime timeline to contain both maintenance phases, stops before the external provider turn, and prints the emitted phase order:

```sh
node --import /Users/andy/src/openclaw/node_modules/tsx/dist/loader.mjs proof-84792-order-wrapper.ts
```

- **Evidence after fix:** Terminal capture from the command above:

```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "behavior": "runReplyAgent diagnostics show memory flush before preflight compaction",
  "environment": {
    "branch": "proof-84792",
    "timelinePath": "/tmp/openclaw-proof-84792-timeline.jsonl",
    "childPid": 20131
  },
  "phaseStartOrder": [
    "reply.memory_flush",
    "reply.preflight_compaction"
  ],
  "relevantEvents": [
    {
      "type": "span.start",
      "name": "reply.memory_flush",
      "phase": "agent-turn",
      "timestamp": "2026-05-21T04:30:14.317Z",
      "attributes": {
        "provider": "openai-codex",
        "hasSessionKey": true,
        "isHeartbeat": false,
        "queueMode": "interrupt",
        "isActive": false,
        "blockStreamingEnabled": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "span.end",
      "name": "reply.memory_flush",
      "phase": "agent-turn",
      "timestamp": "2026-05-21T04:30:14.317Z",
      "durationMs": 0.41,
      "attributes": {
        "provider": "openai-codex",
        "hasSessionKey": true,
        "isHeartbeat": false,
        "queueMode": "interrupt",
        "isActive": false,
        "blockStreamingEnabled": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "span.start",
      "name": "reply.preflight_compaction",
      "phase": "agent-turn",
      "timestamp": "2026-05-21T04:30:14.317Z",
      "attributes": {
        "provider": "openai-codex",
        "hasSessionKey": true,
        "isHeartbeat": false,
        "queueMode": "interrupt",
        "isActive": false,
        "blockStreamingEnabled": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "span.end",
      "name": "reply.preflight_compaction",
      "phase": "agent-turn",
      "timestamp": "2026-05-21T04:30:14.403Z",
      "durationMs": 85.355,
      "attributes": {
        "provider": "openai-codex",
        "hasSessionKey": true,
        "isHeartbeat": false,
        "queueMode": "interrupt",
        "isActive": false,
        "blockStreamingEnabled": false
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

- **Observed result after fix:** The emitted `phaseStartOrder` is exactly `reply.memory_flush` followed by `reply.preflight_compaction`, proving the patched runner enters memory flush before preflight compaction.
- **What was not tested:** The wrapper intentionally stops before sending an external model request; it verifies runner phase order and diagnostics emission, not model-provider output.

## Validation

- `/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin/node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-direct-runtime-config.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-memory.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/reply-state.test.ts`
- `/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin/node /Users/andy/openclaw/node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.src.json --pretty false --declaration false --singleThreaded --checkers 1`
- `/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin/node /Users/andy/openclaw/node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-direct-runtime-config.test.ts`

If this PR is squash-merged or reworked, please preserve author attribution or include:

`Co-authored-by: Andy Ye <35905412+TurboTheTurtle@users.noreply.github.com>`
target.author: turbotheturtle
